recommendations.title: Family Switch
recommendations.overview: When the Walker family members switch bodies with each other during a rare planetary alignment, their hilarious journey to find their way back to normal will bring them closer together than they ever thought possible.

recommendations.title: Uglies
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic dystopia with enforced beauty standards, a teen awaiting mandatory cosmetic surgery embarks on a journey to find her missing friend.

recommendations.title: The Babysitter
recommendations.overview: When Cole stays up past his bedtime, he discovers that his hot babysitter is part of a Satanic cult that will stop at nothing to keep him quiet.

recommendations.title: This Means War
recommendations.overview: Two top CIA operatives wage an epic battle against one another after they discover they are dating the same woman.

recommendations.title: Rim of the World
recommendations.overview: Stranded at a summer camp when aliens attack the planet, four teens with nothing in common embark on a perilous mission to save the world.

recommendations.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
recommendations.overview: The Angels are charged with finding a pair of missing rings that are encoded with the personal information of members of the Witness Protection Program. As informants are killed, the ladies target a rogue agent who might be responsible.

recommendations.title: The Babysitter: Killer Queen
recommendations.overview: Two years after defeating a satanic cult led by his babysitter Bee, Cole's trying to forget his past and focus on surviving high school. But when old enemies unexpectedly return, Cole will once again have to outsmart the forces of evil.

recommendations.title: 3 Days to Kill
recommendations.overview: A dangerous international spy is determined to give up his high stakes life to finally build a closer relationship with his estranged wife and daughter. But first, he must complete one last mission - even if it means juggling the two toughest assignm

recommendations.title: King Richard
recommendations.overview: The story of how Richard Williams served as a coach to his daughters Venus and Serena, who will soon become two of the most legendary tennis players in history.

recommendations.title: Invincible
